title: Credit Control Management
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable finance workshop for applying credit control management more confidently at work.
whyThisMatters: Credit Control Management helps managers, finance support teams, and business users understand credit control management in practical workplace terms. The session connects You will understand the objective, purpose and concepts of accounting and Illustration with credit control policy to better financial decisions, controls, and business conversations.
builtFor: Department heads responsible for budgets, records, or controls
Business owners who want stronger financial awareness
walkAwayWith: Understand the key financial concepts and business implications.
Read information with clearer awareness of cost, risk, and performance.
Ask better questions when reviewing records, reports, or decisions.
Use finance thinking to support planning and follow-through.

modules.title: You will understand the objective, purpose and concepts of accounting

methodologyCaption: The session uses practical business examples and guided exercises so participants can apply financial thinking to workplace decisions.
